field.name: ma_dvcs
field.check: ma_dvcs not in (select ma_dvcs from dmdvcs)⩓exists(select 1 from #unit b where @@table.ngay_ct = b.ngay_ct and @@table.so_ct = b.so_ct having count(b.ma_dvcs) > 1)⩓not exists(select 1 from sysunitrights b where @@table.ma_dvcs = b.ma_dvcs and b.user_id = @user and b.r_new = 1)

field.name: ma_kh
field.check: ma_kh not in (select ma_kh from dmkh)

field.name: tk
field.check: tk not in (select tk from dmtk where loai_tk = 1)

field.name: ma_nt
field.check: ma_nt not in (select ma_nt from dmnt)

field.name: ma_thue
field.check: ma_thue not in (select ma_thue from dmthue)

field.name: tk_thue
field.check: tk_thue not in (select tk from dmtk where loai_tk = 1)

field.name: ma_kh2
field.check: ma_kh2 = '' and exists(select 1 from dmtk b where @@table.tk_thue = b.tk and b.tk_cn = 1) ⩓ma_kh2 <> '' and not exists(select 1 from dmkh b where @@table.ma_kh2 = b.ma_kh)

field.name: ma_tt
field.check: ma_tt <> '' and ma_tt not in (select ma_tt from dmtt)

field.name: ma_vv
field.check: ma_vv <> '' and ma_vv not in (select ma_vv from dmvv)

field.name: ma_bp
field.check: ma_bp <> '' and ma_bp not in (select ma_bp from dmbp)

field.name: so_lsx
field.check: so_lsx <> '' and so_lsx not in (select so_lsx from phlsx)

field.name: ma_sp
field.check: ma_sp <> '' and ma_sp not in (select ma_vt from vdmsp)

field.name: ma_hd
field.check: ma_hd <> '' and ma_hd not in (select ma_hd from dmhd)

field.name: ma_phi
field.check: ma_phi <> '' and ma_phi not in (select ma_phi from dmphi)

processing.text: &CheckVoucherRightBeforeProcess; declare @q nvarchar(4000), @duplicate nvarchar(512), @locked nvarchar(512), @field varchar(32), @wsID varchar(8), @voucherID varchar(8) declare @master varchar(16), @detail varchar(16), @inquiry varchar(16), @general varchar(16), @baseCurrency varchar(8), @datetime0 char(21), @d0 datetime declare @user int, @admin bit, @r int, @m int, @y int, @max1 int, @max2 int, @currentID int, @count int, @roundPrice int, @roundAmount int, @roundFAmount int select @d0 = getdate(), @datetime0 = convert(char(8), @d0, 112) + ' ' + convert(char(12), @d0, 114), @status = left(replace(@status, '''', ''), 1) select @admin = @@admin, @user = @@userID, @master = 'm&Detail;$', @detail = 'd&Detail;$', @inquiry = 'i&Detail;$', @general = 'c&Detail;$000000', @voucherID = '&Code;' select @locked = case when @@language = 'v' then N'Đã khóa số liệu, kiểm tra lại ngày chứng từ tại dòng %s.' else N'Data is locked, please check the date of voucher at row %s.' end select @duplicate = case when @@language = 'v' then N'Chứng từ số %s1 ngày %s2 tại dòng %s3 đã tồn tại.' else 'The voucher number %s1 dated %s2 at row %s3 already exists.' end select @wsID = rtrim(val) from options where name = 'm_ws_id' select @baseCurrency = rtrim(val) from options where name = 'm_ma_nt0' select @roundPrice = cast(rtrim(val) as int) from options where name = 'm_round_gia' select @roundAmount = cast(rtrim(val) as int) from options where name = 'm_round_tien' select @roundFAmount = cast(rtrim(val) as int) from options where name = 'm_round_tien_nt' select @max1 = character_maximum_length from information_schema.columns where table_name = @master + '000000' and column_name = 'so_ct' select @max2 = character_maximum_length from information_schema.columns where table_name = @detail + '000000' and column_name = 'so_lsx' -- Checking update @@table set so_ct = space(@max1 - len(rtrim(ltrim(so_ct)))) + rtrim(ltrim(so_ct)) --if @check$Unit <> '1' select @r = min(stt) from @@table a join c&Detail;$000000 b on a.ngay_ct = b.ngay_ct and a.so_ct = b.so_ct -- else select @r = min(stt) from @@table a join c&Detail;$000000 b on a.ngay_ct = b.ngay_ct and a.so_ct = b.so_ct and a.ma_dvcs = b.ma_dvcs --if @r is not null begin -- if @check$Unit <> '1' select replace(replace(replace(@duplicate, '%s1', so_ct), '%s2', convert(varchar(12), cast(ngay_ct as smalldatetime), 103)), '%s3', @@delta + @r) as --message from @@table where stt = @r -- else select replace(replace(replace(replace(@duplicate$Unit, '%s1', so_ct), '%s2', convert(varchar(12), cast(ngay_ct as smalldatetime), 103)), '%s3', rtrim(ma_dvcs)), '%s4', --@@delta + @r) as message from @@table where stt = @r -- return --end -- Update update @@table set so_lsx = space(@max2 - len(ltrim(rtrim(so_lsx)))) + ltrim(rtrim(so_lsx)), ma_nt = case when a.ma_nt <> '' then a.ma_nt else @baseCurrency end, tk = case when a.tk <> '' then a.tk else c.tk end, tk_thue = case when a.tk_thue <> '' then a.tk_thue else d.tk_thue_co end, ma_tt = case when a.ma_tt <> '' then a.ma_tt else c.ma_tt end from @@table a left join dmkh c on a.ma_kh = c.ma_kh left join dmthue d on a.ma_thue = d.ma_thue select top 0 a.ma_dvcs, a.ngay_ct, a.so_ct, b.ma_kh, b.so_seri, b.tk into #unit from m&Detail;$000000 a, @@table b insert into #unit select ma_dvcs, ngay_ct, so_ct, ma_kh, so_seri, tk from @@table group by ma_dvcs, ngay_ct, so_ct, ma_kh, so_seri,tk -- Locked Date select @r = min(stt) from @@table a, dmstt b where (a.ngay_ct < b.ngay_gh1) or (a.ngay_ct > b.ngay_gh2) or (a.ngay_ct <= b.ngay_ks)&LockedDate; select @r = min(stt) from @@table a, dmctks b where b.user_id = @user and b.ma_ct = @voucherID and a.ngay_ct <= b.ngay_ks&LockedDate; select @r = min(stt) from @@table a, dmdvcsks b where a.ma_dvcs = b.ma_dvcs and a.ngay_ct <= b.ngay_ks&LockedDate; select @r = min(stt) from @@table a, dmct2ks b where b.ma_ct = @voucherID and a.ngay_ct <= b.ngay_ks&LockedDate; select @r = min(stt) from @@table a, sysdaterules b where b.user_id = @user and ((b.ngay_ct1 is not null and a.ngay_ct < b.ngay_ct1) or (b.ngay_ct2 is not null and a.ngay_ct > b.ngay_ct2))&LockedDate; -- Check code select @field = 'ma_kh', @r = min(stt) from @@table where ma_kh <>'' and ma_kh not in (select ma_kh from dmkh)&Error; select @field = 'tk', @r = min(stt) from @@table where tk <>'' and tk not in (select tk from dmtk where loai_tk=1)&Error; select @field = 'tk_dt', @r = min(stt) from @@table where tk_dt <>'' and tk_dt not in (select tk from dmtk where loai_tk=1)&Error; select @field = 'tk_thue', @r = min(stt) from @@table where tk_thue <>'' and tk_thue not in (select tk from dmtk where loai_tk=1)&Error; select @field = 'ma_nk', @r = min(stt) from @@table where ma_nk <> '' and ma_nk not in (select ma_nk from v20dmnk)&Error; select @field = 'ma_vv', @r = min(stt) from @@table where ma_vv <> '' and ma_vv not in (select ma_vv from dmvv)&Error; select @field = 'ma_bp', @r = min(stt) from @@table where ma_bp <> '' and ma_bp not in (select ma_bp from dmbp)&Error; select @field = 'so_lsx', @r = min(stt) from @@table where so_lsx <> '' and so_lsx not in (select so_lsx from phlsx)&Error; select @field = 'ma_sp', @r = min(stt) from @@table where ma_sp <> '' and ma_sp not in (select ma_vt from vdmsp)&Error; select @field = 'ma_hd', @r = min(stt) from @@table where ma_hd <> '' and ma_hd not in (select ma_hd from dmhd)&Error; select @field = 'ma_phi', @r = min(stt) from @@table where ma_phi <> '' and ma_phi not in (select ma_phi from dmphi)&Error; select @field = 'ma_thue', @r = min(stt) from @@table where ma_thue <> '' and ma_thue not in (select ma_thue from dmthue)&Error; -- Gather select top 0 stt_rec, ngay_ct, so_ct,ma_kh, so_seri,tk, cast(0 as int) as stt, identity(int, 1, 1) as id into #id from m&Detail;$000000 insert into #id(stt_rec, ngay_ct, so_ct, ma_kh, so_seri, tk, stt) select '', ngay_ct, so_ct, ma_kh, so_seri, tk, min(stt) from @@table group by ngay_ct, so_ct, ma_kh, so_seri,tk order by ngay_ct, so_ct, ma_kh, so_seri,tk select identity(int, 1, 1) as id, cast(stt as int) as stt, convert(varchar(8), ngay_ct, 112) + so_ct + ma_kh + so_seri + tk as c, cast(0 as int) as ln into #ln from @@table order by ngay_ct, so_ct, ma_kh, so_seri, tk, stt declare @lineNumber int, @keyValue varchar(64), @sequence bit select @keyValue = null update #ln set @sequence = case when c = @keyValue then 1 else 0 end, @lineNumber = case when @sequence = 1 then @lineNumber + 1 else 1 end, ln = @lineNumber, @keyValue = c from #ln with (index(0)) create index i on #ln(stt) select @count = count(*) from #id select @currentID = stt_rec from dmstt update dmstt set stt_rec = stt_rec + @count update #id set stt_rec = @wsID + replace(str(id + rtrim(@currentID) , 9), ' ', '0') + @voucherID select top 0 stt_rec, stt_rec0, line_nbr, ngay_ct, so_ct, dvt, so_luong, gia_nt, gia, tien_nt2, tien2, ma_thue, thue_suat, tk_thue, thue_nt, thue, tk_dt , ma_kh2, dien_giai, ma_vv, ma_bp, so_lsx, ma_sp, ma_hd, ma_phi into #d&Detail; from d&Detail;$000000 insert into #d&Detail; select b.stt_rec, dbo.MaxvOnline$Function$Voucher$GetRecordsGroup(i.ln), i.ln, a.ngay_ct, a.so_ct, a.dvt, a.so_luong, a.gia_nt, round(a.gia_nt * a.ty_gia, @roundPrice), a.tien_nt2, round(a.tien_nt2 * a.ty_gia, @roundAmount), a.ma_thue, d.thue_suat, a.tk_thue, a.thue_nt, round(a.thue_nt * a.ty_gia, @roundAmount), a.tk_dt, a.ma_kh2, a.dien_giai2, a.ma_vv, a.ma_bp, a.so_lsx, a.ma_sp, a.ma_hd, a.ma_phi from @@table a join #id b on a.ngay_ct = b.ngay_ct and a.so_ct = b.so_ct and a.ma_kh=b.ma_kh and a.so_seri=b.so_seri and a.tk=b.tk left join dmthue d on a.ma_thue = d.ma_thue join #ln i on a.stt = i.stt order by a.ngay_ct, a.so_ct, a.stt select top 0 stt_rec, status, ma_dvcs, ma_nk, ngay_ct, so_ct, so_seri, dien_giai, tk, ma_kh, ma_tt, ma_nt, ty_gia, t_tien_nt2, t_tien2, t_thue_nt, t_thue, ong_ba into #m&Detail; from m&Detail;$000000 insert into #m&Detail; select b.stt_rec, @status, a.ma_dvcs, a.ma_nk, a.ngay_ct, a.so_ct, a.so_seri, a.dien_giai, a.tk, a.ma_kh, a.ma_tt, a.ma_nt, a.ty_gia, d.t_tien_nt2, d.t_tien2, d.t_thue_nt, d.t_thue, a.ong_ba from @@table a join #id b on a.stt = b.stt join #unit c on a.ngay_ct = c.ngay_ct and a.so_ct = c.so_ct and a.ma_kh = c.ma_kh and a.so_seri=c.so_seri and a.tk=c.tk join (select stt_rec, sum(tien_nt2) as t_tien_nt2, sum(tien2) as t_tien2, sum(thue_nt) as t_thue_nt, sum(thue) as t_thue from #d&Detail; group by stt_rec) d on b.stt_rec = d.stt_rec select top 0 stt_rec, ngay_ct, so_ct, ma_dvcs, status, user_id0, c$, m$, d$, identity(int, 1, 1) as id into #i&Detail; from i&Detail;$000000 insert into #i&Detail; select stt_rec, ngay_ct, so_ct, ma_dvcs, @status, @user, convert(varchar(12), ngay_ct, 112) + so_ct + stt_rec, '#10$' + rtrim(ma_kh) + '#20$' + rtrim(ma_nt) + '#30$' + rtrim(tk), '' from #m&Detail; select @q = dbo.MaxvOnline$Function$Update$Inquiry('#i&Detail;', '#d&Detail;', 'd$', 'tk_dt, ma_thue', '#10$, #20$', 'stt_rec', default, default, default, default, default) exec sp_executesql @q declare @p varchar(32), @masterTable varchar(32), @detailTable varchar(32), @inquiryTable varchar(32), @insertKey varchar(128), @masterFields varchar(8000), @detailFields varchar(8000) -- check tiep select @masterFields = 'stt_rec, ma_dvcs, loai_ct, ma_ct, ma_nk, ngay_ct, ngay_lct, so_seri, so_ct, so_dh, so_lo, ngay_lo, ma_gd,' select @masterFields = @masterFields + 'ma_kh, ong_ba, dien_giai, ma_bp, ma_nvbh, tk, ma_nt, ty_gia,' select @masterFields = @masterFields + 't_tien_nt2, t_tien2, t_thue_nt, t_thue, tk_thue_no, ten_vtthue, ghi_chuthue, tk_ck, t_ck_nt, t_ck, ma_tt,' select @masterFields = @masterFields + 't_tt_nt, t_tt, nam, ky, sl_in, status, datetime0, datetime2, user_id0, user_id2,' select @masterFields = @masterFields + 'contract_id, bcontract_id, fee_id, job_id, prd_id, dept_id, mo_nbr,' select @masterFields = @masterFields + 'fcode1, fcode2, fcode3, fdate1, fdate2, fdate3, fqty1, fqty2, fqty3, fnote1, fnote2, fnote3, s1, s2, s3, s4, s5, s6, s7, s8, s9' select @detailFields = 'stt_rec, stt_rec0, ma_ct, ngay_ct, so_ct, tk_dt, dvt, so_luong, gia, gia_nt, tien_nt2, tien2,' select @detailFields = @detailFields + 'dien_giai, ma_thue, thue_suat, tk_thue, thue_nt, thue, tk_ck, tl_ck, ck_nt, ck, tt, tt_nt,' select @detailFields = @detailFields + 'ma_kh2, ma_vv, ma_sp, ma_bp, so_lsx, line_nbr, ma_hd, ma_phi, so_dh_i,' select @detailFields = @detailFields + 'ma_td1, ma_td2, ma_td3, sl_td1, sl_td2, sl_td3, ngay_td1, ngay_td2, ngay_td3, gc_td1, gc_td2, gc_td3, s1, s2, s3, s4, s5, s6, s7, s8, s9' select distinct month(ngay_ct) as m, year(ngay_ct) as y into #k from #id select @r = min(y * 12 + m) from #k while @r is not null begin select @m = m, @y = y from #k where y * 12 + m = @r select @p = rtrim(@y) + replace(str(@m, 2), ' ', '0'), @insertKey = 'month(ngay_ct) = ' + rtrim(@m) + ' and year(ngay_ct) = ' + rtrim(@y) select @masterTable = @master + @p, @detailTable = @detail + @p, @inquiryTable = @inquiry + @p -- m21 select @q = 'insert into ' + @masterTable + '(' + @masterFields + ')' + ' select stt_rec, ma_dvcs, '''', ''' + @voucherID + ''',' select @q = @q + 'ma_nk, ngay_ct, ngay_ct, so_seri, so_ct, '''', '''', null, '''', ma_kh, ong_ba, dien_giai, '''', '''', tk, ma_nt, ty_gia,' select @q = @q + 't_tien_nt2, t_tien2, t_thue_nt, t_thue, tk, '''', '''', '''', 0, 0, '''', t_tien_nt2 + t_thue_nt, t_tien2 + t_thue,' select @q = @q + '0, 0, 0, ''' + @status + ''', getdate(), getdate(), ' + rtrim(@user) + ',' + rtrim(@user) + ', ' select @q = @q + ''''', '''', '''', '''', '''', '''', '''', '''', '''', '''', null, null, null, 0, 0, 0, '''', '''', '''', '''', '''', '''', 0, 0, 0, null, null, null' select @q = @q + ' from #m21 where month(ngay_ct) = ' + rtrim(@m) + ' and year(ngay_ct) = ' + rtrim(@y) exec sp_executesql @q -- d21 select @q = 'insert into ' + @detailTable + '(' + @detailFields + ')' + ' select stt_rec, stt_rec0, ''' + @voucherID + ''', ngay_ct, so_ct,' select @q = @q + 'tk_dt, dvt, so_luong, gia, gia_nt, tien_nt2, tien2, dien_giai, ma_thue, thue_suat, tk_thue, thue_nt, thue, '''', 0, 0, 0, 0, 0,' select @q = @q + 'ma_kh2, ma_vv, ma_sp, ma_bp, so_lsx, line_nbr, ma_hd, ma_phi, '''',' select @q = @q + ''''', '''', '''', 0, 0, 0, null, null, null, '''', '''', '''', '''', '''', '''', 0, 0, 0, null, null, null' select @q = @q + ' from #d21 where month(ngay_ct) = ' + rtrim(@m) + ' and year(ngay_ct) = ' + rtrim(@y) exec sp_executesql @q --i21 select @q = 'insert into ' + @inquiryTable + ' select stt_rec, ngay_ct, so_ct, ma_dvcs, status, user_id0, c$, m$, d$' select @q = @q + ' from #i21 where month(ngay_ct) = ' + rtrim(@m) + ' and year(ngay_ct) = ' + rtrim(@y) exec sp_executesql @q -- c21 select @q = 'insert into ' + @general + ' select stt_rec, ngay_ct, so_ct, ma_dvcs, status, user_id0' select @q = @q + ' from #i21 where month(ngay_ct) = ' + rtrim(@m) + ' and year(ngay_ct) = ' + rtrim(@y) exec sp_executesql @q select @r = min(y * 12 + m) from #k where y * 12 + m > @r end insert into ctgt21 (stt_rec, ngay_ct, ngay_lct, ten_kh, dia_chi, ma_so_thue) select a.stt_rec, a.ngay_ct, a.ngay_ct, b.ten_kh, b.dia_chi, b.ma_so_thue from #m&Detail; a join dmkh b on a.ma_kh = b.ma_kh declare @External nvarchar(4000), @Statement nvarchar(4000), @Numeric varchar(4000), @String varchar(4000), @fieldSelect varchar(4000) if @status <> '0' begin select * into #detailpost from #d&Detail; where line_nbr = 1 select @External = 'ten_vt = b.dien_giai, tk_du = c.tk, tk_thue_co = b.tk_thue, t_thue_nt = b.thue_nt, t_thue = b.thue, t_tien_nt2 = b.tien_nt2, t_tien2 = b.tien2, status = ''' + @status + ''',ma_ct = ''' + @voucherID + ''', ngay_lct = b.ngay_ct, datetime0 = ''' + @datetime0 + ''', datetime2 = ''' + @datetime0 + ''', user_id0 = ' + rtrim(@user) + ', user_id2 = ' + rtrim(@user) select @Statement = '', @Numeric = 'nam, ky, sl_td1, sl_td2, sl_td3, s4, s5, s6', @String = 'loai_ct, ma_kho,ghi_chu, ma_nvbh,so_dh, ma_nk, ma_mau_ct, ma_td1, ma_td2, ma_td3, gc_td1, gc_td2, gc_td3, s1, s2, s3' exec MaxvOnline$Voucher$Import$PostTax '#m&Detail;', '#d&Detail;', '#k', @Numeric, @String, @External, @Statement, '1' select @External = 'status = ''' + @status + ''',ma_ct = ''' + @voucherID + ''', loai_ct = '''', ngay_ct0 = b.ngay_ct, dien_giai = c.dien_giai, t_tt_nt = c.t_tien_nt2 + c.t_thue_nt, t_tt = c.t_tien2 + c.t_thue, t_tien_nt2 = c.t_tien_nt2, t_tien2 = c.t_tien2, datetime0 = ''' + @datetime0 + ''', datetime2 = ''' + @datetime0 + ''', user_id0 = ' + rtrim(@user) + ', user_id2 = ' + rtrim(@user) select @Statement = '', @Numeric = 'tt, tt_nt, sl_td1, sl_td2, sl_td3, s4, s5, s6', @String = 'ma_td1, ma_td2, ma_td3, gc_td1, s1, s2, s3' exec MaxvOnline$Voucher$Import$PostPayment '#m&Detail;', '#detailpost', 'tk', @Numeric, @String, @External, @Statement, '0', '1', '0' end if @status = '2' begin declare @glGroup varchar(128), @glAcctField varchar(128), @glAcctFieldRef varchar(128), @glAmountField varchar(128), @glFCAmountField varchar(128), @glKey varchar(512), @glNoAccList VARCHAR(128), @glNoAccListRef VARCHAR(128), @cNoAccounts varchar(128) select @cNoAccounts = replace(rtrim(val), '''', '''''') from options where name = 'm_tk_tk_vt' select @glAcctField = 'tk', @glAcctFieldRef = 'tk_dt', @glAmountField = 'tien2', @glFCAmountField = 'tien_nt2', @glKey = '1=1', @glNoAccList = '0', @glNoAccListRef = '0' select @Numeric = 'nam, ky, sl_td1, sl_td2, sl_td3, s4, s5, s6', @String = 'so_lo, ma_gd, so_dh, gc_td1, gc_td2, gc_td3, s1, s2, s3', @External = 'dien_giai_h = b.dien_giai, datetime0 = ''' + @datetime0 + ''', datetime2 = ''' + @datetime0 + ''', user_id0 = ' + rtrim(@user) + ', user_id2 = ' + rtrim(@user), @Statement = '' select @glGroup = groupby from @@sysDatabaseName..voucherinfo where ma_ct = @voucherID select stt_rec, stt_rec0, line_nbr, ngay_ct, so_ct, tien_nt2, tien2, tk_dt, cast('' as varchar(32)) as ma_kh2, ma_vv, ma_bp, so_lsx, ma_sp, ma_hd, ma_phi, dien_giai into #dGL0 from #d&Detail; update #d&Detail; set ma_kh2 = '' where tk_thue in (select tk from dmtk where tk_cn = 0) insert into #dGL0 select a.stt_rec, a.stt_rec0, a.line_nbr, a.ngay_ct, a.so_ct, a.thue_nt, a.thue, a.tk_thue, a.ma_kh2, a.ma_vv, a.ma_bp, a.so_lsx, a.ma_sp, a.ma_hd, a.ma_phi, b.dien_giai as dien_giai from #d&Detail; a Left join #m&Detail; b on a.stt_rec = b.stt_rec where a.thue_suat <> 0 select a.*, b.tk, b.ma_dvcs, b.ma_kh, case when a.ma_kh2 <> '' then a.ma_kh2 else b.ma_kh end as ma_kh_ref, @voucherID as ma_ct, cast('' as char(2)) as loai_ct, b.ngay_ct as ngay_lct, b.ma_nt, b.ty_gia, b.dien_giai as dien_giai_h , '' as ma_ku, '' as ma_td1, '' as ma_td2, '' as ma_td3, b.ma_nk as ma_nk, b.ong_ba as ong_ba into #dGL from #dGL0 a join #m&Detail; b on a.stt_rec = b.stt_rec where (not (@cNoAccounts <> '' and dbo.ff_inlist(b.tk, @cNoAccounts) = 1)) exec MaxvOnline$Voucher$Import$PostGL2 '#m&Detail;', '#dGL', @voucherID, @glAcctField, @glAcctFieldRef, @glAmountField, @glFCAmountField, @glKey, @glNoAccList, @glNoAccListRef, @glGroup, @Numeric, @String, @External, @Statement, '#k' end
